crawled_name:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Santa Paula CA PD
acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Santa Paula CA PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy:
Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
USAGE
hotlists_alerted_on:
National and statewide hotlist sources.

California SVS, NCMEC Amber Alert
overview:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Santa Paula CA PD uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Santa Paula CA PD utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Santa Paula CA PD utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.

POLICIES
